title: CenterPntRotOffset Property
description: Specifies whether the center point offset should be rotated or not.
notes:
Set CenterPntRotOffset to True if you want the center point offset to be rotated by the Angle result of the CenterPointObject.

Values

True - rotate the offset

False - do not rotate the offset

Default: False

See Also: CenterPntObjResult Property

CenterPointObject Property

CenterPntOffsetX Property

CenterPntOffsetY Property

Vision Objects: CenterPntObjResult Property

ColorMatch
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: ArcFinder, ArcInspector, Blob, BoxFinder, CodeReader, Contour, CornerFinder, Correlation, DefectFinder, Edge, Geometric, LineFinder, OCR, Polar
